name: Veggie Pastitsio
recipeIngredient: several dashes of red pepper sauce
1/4 cup flour (for a white sauce: use cake flour for fineness)
3 egg whites or equivalent egg replacer
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the lentils according to package instructions.
2. Sauté chopped onion, carrots, and garlic in water until soft.
3. Add tomatoes, tomato paste, red pepper sauce, and cinnamon to the sautéed vegetables. Stir well.
4. Mix in the cooked lentils.
5. Warm milk over medium heat.
6. Gradually add flour to the warm milk, constantly stirring with a wire whip until thickened.
7. Stir in white pepper and nutmeg.
8. Cook the pasta according to package instructions. Drain and return to the pot. Add egg whites or egg replacer and stir.
9. In a large casserole dish (or springform pan), layer half of the pasta mixture.
10. Top with the lentil mixture.
11. Cover with the remaining pasta.
12. Pour the white sauce over the entire dish.
13. Gently shake the dish to settle the sauce.
14. Sprinkle with nutmeg.
15. Bake at 375°F for 1 hour.
